description: Fills a region between 2D shapes or points on a g2d graph with a colored, semi-transparent overlay.
utility: Fill a region between 2D shapes with color

arguments.name: shapes
arguments.description: Shapes or points defining the fill region

alternates.description: Fill region between three shapes with default styling

alternates.syntax: highlightfill(G, A, B, C, fc(yellow), fo(0.3))
alternates.description: Fill region with custom color and transparency

examples.scenario: Fill triangular region between three points
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,8), 20, 20, type(plotting))
A = point(G, 0, 0)
B = point(G, 4, 0)
C = point(G, 2, 3)
highlightfill(G, A, B, C)

examples.scenario: Fill region between curves with yellow highlight
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,8), 20, 20, type(plotting))
f1 = plot(G, "x^2")
f2 = plot(G, "2*x + 1")
highlightfill(G, f1, f2, fc(yellow), fo(0.3))
